chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 115 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.21 2. For hearing of main case 3. For orders on CMA No.1058/2018 06.03.2026 Mr. Iqbal M. Khurram, advocate for the applicant This matter is pending since 2018 without any progress; even notice has not been sought till date. On 20.04.2018, following order was passed: “20.04.2018 Mr. Iqbal M. Khurram, advocate for applicant 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred. 3. Exemption application is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. Learned counsel for applicant/department may reformulate the questions. Adjourned to a date in office” Today learned counsel is present and merely seeks time. It appears that the applicant is not interested in proceeding with the matter. Accordingly, in view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
